years.title: AIClub 2025 Student Research Symposium
years.summary: A celebration of AI innovations by K-12 students, featuring research presentations in healthcare, climate, agriculture, music, and social impact.
years.keynote: Dr. Jan Heng (Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center) on AI in Breast Cancer Research

years.title: AIClub 2024 Student Research Symposium
years.summary: Student work across healthcare, climate, agriculture, and creative AI applications, with industry insights from keynote leaders.

years.title: AIClub 2023 Student Research Symposium
years.summary: Student AI research presentations with a keynote focused on language-model foundations and future directions.
years.keynote: Ashish Bansal (Google), author of Advanced NLP with TensorFlow

years.title: AIClub 2022 Student Research Symposium
years.summary: Held June 25, 2022, with K-12 presenters and families exploring AI solutions for real-world challenges.
years.keynote: Dr. Nikunj Oza (NASA Ames) on Data Science at NASA

years.title: AIClub 2021 Student Research Symposium
years.summary: Early AIClub symposium featuring middle and high school research talks and a roadmap for starting AI research before college.
years.keynote: Dr. Bharath Ramsundar on open-source AI for medicine discovery
